series_metadata.series_description: Schedule of financial reports: (OBM-GAAP - Generally Accepted Accounting Principles, used to compile the Ohio Comprehensive Annual Financial Report. SWCAP - ODM Allocation of the statewide Cost Allocation Plan. Schedule of Federal Financial Assistance - schedule of federal grants dollars received by ODM during the state fiscal year.) Files include backup documentation, worksheets, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then print and store in Medicaid record storage area. ; Paper: Retain in Medicaid records center, provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Permanent
